_comment: Phase 4 — Agent config. Copy to ../.config/pipeline-agent.json and fill in your API keys, or set environment variables instead.

agent._comment_keys: Set real keys in ../.config/pipeline-agent.json (gitignored), or export OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
agent._comment_models: defaultModel is used for leaf agents; routerModel for routing decisions.
agent._comment_location: Default city/timezone for DateTimeTools and zmanim. Change to your city.
agent._comment_global_tools: DATE_TIME is global — every agent needs to know the current date before calling calendar or zmanim tools.
agent._comment_global_mcp: MCP servers listed here are connected to every leaf agent. Leave empty if none.
agent._comment_tree: The agent tree. Add/remove nodes in JSON — no code changes needed.

tree.name: Sefaria Agent
tree.description: Routes Jewish learning questions to the right specialist

children.name: Halakha
children.description: Questions about Jewish law and halachic practice

children.name: Shabbat
children.description: Laws of Shabbat: melachot, candle lighting, eruv, muktzeh, electric devices

children.name: Kashrut
children.description: Laws of kosher food, meat and milk, slaughter, wine

children.name: General Halakha
children.description: All other Jewish law questions: prayer, lifecycle, family purity, brachot, mourning

children.name: Dvar Torah
children.description: Weekly parasha, divrei Torah, sermon prep, Midrash and commentary on the text
children._comment_retrieval: topK=0 disables auto-RAG. Dvar Torah queries need to resolve the parasha via HEBREW_CALENDAR first, then do targeted lookups via SEFARIA_LOOKUP. Auto-RAG on the raw query produces noise before those tool calls happen.

children.name: General Jewish Learning
children.description: General questions about Jewish texts, history, theology, and thought
